summary: Average recording of a lackluster Philadelphia show with only a few highlights.
review: The reviewer, who attended the concert in Philadelphia, felt the band was merely going through the motions and that the performance was largely unremarkable, though a few gems were noted. No comments were made about the audio source or sound quality, so the recording’s technical merits remain unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review that leans negative about the performance and provides no information on recording quality, resulting in an overall average rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not discuss audio clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as mostly unremarkable and going through the motions, with only a few standout moments.
